'''鈭歠-p-p-p''' ('''kafappepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dungeon|dungeon]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-p-p-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dungeon|dungeon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-p-p-p
|-
! Lemma
| kafappepoko
|}
